headline: TD Cowen Says The Home Depot (HD) Delivered Solid Execution in Challenging Market
summary: The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE:HD) is included among the Dividend Stock Portfolio For Retirement: Top 12 Stock Picks. On May 20, TD Cowen lowered its price recommendation on The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE:HD) to $375 from $450. It reiterated a Buy rating on the shares. The firm said first-quarter results were broadly in line with […]

headline: 5 Must-Read Analyst Questions From Home Depot’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: Home Depot’s first quarter results for 2026 met Wall Street’s revenue expectations and delivered a modest adjusted earnings per share beat, with market reaction remaining largely unchanged. Management attributed the quarter’s performance to continued growth in its Pro segment, ongoing investments in digital platforms, and positive engagement in spring-related categories, despite persistent caution among consumers regarding larger discretionary projects. headline: Home Depot Sales Recovery And Mingledorff’s Deal Strengthen Pro Growth Story
summary: Home Depot (NYSE:HD) has recorded a sixth consecutive quarter of positive U.S. same-store sales. This performance brings its comparable sales in line with key rival Lowe's after a prior period of relative weakness. Home Depot has agreed to acquire Mingledorff’s, an HVAC distributor, expanding its reach with professional customers. For investors watching the home improvement sector, NYSE:HD sits at the center of consumer DIY demand and professional construction activity. The recent run of...
